page.content: In the JPMorgan Chase Wealth Management Overview for January 2024, the Assets Under Management (AUM) totals CNY 1 trillion, with a growth rate of 4.5%. The High Net Worth client segment holds CNY 500 billion, reflecting a change of 5.2%, with 10,000 new clients contributing to total revenue of CNY 10 billion and net income of CNY 2 billion. Retail Clients account for CNY 300 billion, up by 3.8%, with 5,000 new clients generating CNY 6 billion in revenue and net income of CNY 1 billion. Institutional Clients represent CNY 200 billion, exhibiting a growth rate of 4.1%, attracting 2,000 new clients and yielding CNY 4 billion in total revenue and CNY 800 million in net income. The market performance indicates an average AUM growth of 10% over one year, with a client retention rate of 92% and a satisfaction rate of 88%. Future projections anticipate an AUM of CNY 1.2 trillion, with a growth rate of 7% and 20,000 new clients, leading to total revenue of CNY 30 billion. In the Fee Income Breakdown, Corporate Banking contributes CNY 1.5 billion, 45%, with service fees at CNY 1.58 billion, Retail Banking at CNY 900 million, 27%, and Investment Banking at CNY 600 million, 18%, while Other Income adds CNY 300 million, 9%.

page.content: Total income stands at CNY 3.3 billion, 100%, with a growth rate of 4%.

page.content: The forecast for 2024 indicates total income of CNY 3.5 billion, 105%, projected growth of CNY 3.8 billion.
